welcome_body:
Discover exclusive discounts from Iranian-owned businesses near you.

Choose an option below:
reg_prompt_phone: Enter your business phone number (optional — type /skip to skip):
reg_prompt_website: Enter your website URL (optional — type /skip to skip):
reg_prompt_instagram: Enter your Instagram handle (optional — type /skip to skip):
reg_submitted:
✅ Registration received!

Your business is under review. We'll notify you within 24 hours.
reg_approved_notification:
🎉 Congratulations! Your business has been approved!

Use /newdeal to post your first discount.
deal_prompt_title:
Enter the deal title:
(e.g. 20% off all food this weekend)
deal_prompt_description:
Enter the full deal description:
(conditions, promo code, details)
deal_prompt_image: Send a photo for the deal (optional):
deal_posted: ✅ Your deal has been posted and is being delivered to subscribers!
deal_limit_exceeded:
⚠️ You've reached the maximum {max} deals this week.
Try again next week.
deal_duplicate: ⚠️ You already posted a deal with this title recently. Please use a different title.
deal_not_approved: ⚠️ Your account is not yet approved. You can post deals once approved.
deal_invalid_date: ⚠️ Invalid date format. Please use YYYY-MM-DD.
sub_prompt_city: Select your city (or cities — you can pick multiple):
sub_prompt_categories: Select your deal categories of interest:
sub_prompt_frequency: How often would you like to receive notifications?
sub_done:
✅ You're subscribed!

You'll start receiving exclusive Iranian deals shortly.
sub_already: You're already subscribed. Use /settings to update your preferences.
sub_unsubscribed: ✅ You've been unsubscribed. Use /start anytime to re-subscribe.
browse_no_deals: No active deals in your city right now.
admin_menu:
Admin menu:
/pending - Businesses awaiting approval
/stats - Platform statistics
/approve <id> - Approve a business
/reject <id> <reason> - Reject a business
/ban <id> - Ban a business
/broadcast - Send message to all subscribers
admin_no_pending: No businesses are waiting for approval.
admin_paused: ⏸ Business *{name}* has been auto-paused due to reports.
admin_broadcast_prompt: Enter the message to send to all active subscribers:
admin_report_alert:
🚨 *Report received*

Deal: *{dealTitle}*
Business: *{businessName}*
Reports (30d): {count}

Business ID: `{businessId}`
admin_autopause_alert:
⚠️ *Business auto-paused*

Business *{businessName}* has been paused after {count} reports in 30 days.

ID: `{businessId}`
Use /approve {businessId} to reinstate.
editdeal_no_deals: You have no active deals to manage.
editdeal_not_found: ⚠️ Deal not found or already inactive.
report_done: ✅ Deal reported. Thank you for helping keep the community safe.
help_text:
Available commands:

/start - Subscribe to deals
/register - Register your business
/newdeal - Post a new deal
/mydeals - Your active deals
/editdeal - Edit or deactivate a deal
/deals - Browse current deals
/settings - Manage preferences
/language - Switch language
/unsubscribe - Stop notifications
/help - Show this help
error_generic: ⚠️ Something went wrong. Please try again.
